title: Proper Rose Gold
description: Adds Rose Gold items to Minecraft
body:
![Fireflyer with Proper Rose Gold Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99ae147eefb175d458e24baaca6658f136968372.png)

**Description:**
-
This mod adds Rose Gold to Minecraft in a simplistic way. Craft Rose Gold Ingots from Gold and Copper. You can combine Golden Armor with Rose Gold and a Rose Gold Upgrade to craft Rose Golden Armor in a smithing table. (_Rose Gold Upgrades are found mainly in Desert Temples_)

Rose Golden Tools have durability slightly below Iron Tools, but have an increased mining speed like Gold Tools!



Roadmap
-
- ✅ v1: Initial Working Release 
- ✅ v2: Texture Overhaul + Horse Armor 
- 🟨 Update to 1.20.1 Forge
- 🟨 v3: Armor Trims
- 🟥 v4: Loot Table Changes
